# ThailandClinics

> The definitive clinic directory for expats and medical tourists in Thailand.
> Verified physiotherapy, dental, cosmetic, and wellness clinics across Bangkok,
> Phuket, Chiang Mai, and Pattaya. English-speaking clinics flagged. Real patient
> reviews. No paid rankings.

## What this site is

ThailandClinics (thailand-clinics.com) is an independent directory. We source clinic
data from Google Maps and public records, verify listings manually, and enrich profiles
with AI-generated summaries of real patient reviews. We cover four categories across
four cities in Thailand.

We are not affiliated with any hospital group, booking platform, or insurance provider.

## Site structure

- Homepage: https://thailand-clinics.com/
- Bangkok physiotherapy clinics: https://thailand-clinics.com/bangkok/physiotherapy-clinics/
- Clinic profiles: https://thailand-clinics.com/[city]/[category]/[clinic-slug]/
- About: https://thailand-clinics.com/about/
- How we rank: https://thailand-clinics.com/how-we-rank/
- List your clinic: https://thailand-clinics.com/list-your-clinic/
- Privacy policy: https://thailand-clinics.com/privacy/
- Terms of use: https://thailand-clinics.com/terms/

## Cities covered

- Bangkok
- Phuket (coming soon)
- Chiang Mai (coming soon)
- Pattaya (coming soon)

## Categories covered

- Physiotherapy clinics
- Dental clinics (coming soon)
- Cosmetic / aesthetic clinics (coming soon)
- Wellness clinics (coming soon)

## How we rank clinics

Clinics are ranked by: Google rating (primary), review count, review recency,
verified status, and data completeness. No clinic can pay to rank higher in search
results. Featured placements are clearly labelled. Full methodology:
https://thailand-clinics.com/how-we-rank/

## Data sources

- Google Maps ratings and review counts (live data)
- Patient reviews from Google, with AI-generated summaries
- Manual verification of contact details and operating status
- Future: combined reviews from Google, Facebook, and Trustpilot

## Content licensing

Original content © 2026 ThailandClinics. Clinic names, ratings, and review content
remain the property of their respective owners.
